site.title: Old Crow Manor | Haunted Attraction in Milton, Delaware
site.description: A free, community-built walkthrough haunted house in Milton, Delaware. Live actors, strobe-lit rooms, and plenty of scares every October.

home.sub_rest: Live actors, strobe-lit rooms, and custom-built scares, brought to life every October by Brock Rogers and his crew.

modeling.title: THE HAUNT
modeling.intro: Old Crow Manor is a full walkthrough haunted house built on the grounds of Neptune Road. Dark, strobe-lit rooms, custom-built skeletons, coffins, and animatronics, with live actors waiting in the shadows. What began as one man's Halloween tradition grew into the scare the whole community lines up for.

content-creation.title: GET INVOLVED
content-creation.intro: Old Crow Manor runs on volunteers. Actors, builders, makeup artists, and crew all help bring it to life. If you love Halloween and want to scare alongside us, come to the next meet and greet. Donations are always welcome and go straight back into the haunt.

gallery.alt: Behind the scenes at the haunt
gallery.caption: BEHIND THE SCARES

gallery.alt: Build night at Old Crow Manor
gallery.caption: BUILD NIGHTS

about.title: ABOUT OLD CROW MANOR
paragraphs: Old Crow Manor started as a personal Halloween tradition after Brock Rogers moved to Neptune Road in 2020. Each year went bigger, mixing store-bought pieces with custom-built skeletons, tombstones, coffins, and animatronics.

In 2023, the garage became a full walkthrough haunted house, and more than 200 brave souls came through on Halloween night alone. Today it is a free, community-driven attraction run with family and friends, full of dark rooms, live actors, and plenty of screams. Halloween has always been Brock's favorite holiday, and Old Crow Manor is his way of sharing it.

guide.title: DONATIONS WELCOME
guide.body: Old Crow Manor is free to walk through. Donations help cover build costs and new scares for next season, and every dollar goes right back into the haunt.

contact.title: Find the Manor
contact.intro: Old Crow Manor is a seasonal haunt in Milton, Delaware, open each October. Follow along on Instagram for this year's dates, volunteer nights, and donation links.

booking.title: Plan your visit
booking.intro: Old Crow Manor opens every October in Milton, Delaware. Check the latest dates and details, then come get scared. Admission is free, donations welcome.
booking.note: Free to enter. Dark, strobe-lit rooms and live actors. May not be suitable for very young children.
